admin.settings.busy_mode.description: Reduces available slots to signal you are on a mission.
admin.settings.notification_email.title: Notification email
admin.settings.notification_email.descri: Address for new booking notifications. Defaults to the sender address.

admin.settings.locale.description: Notifications you receive will be in this language, regardless of the client's.

admin.settings.buffer.description: Protected time before and after each appointment.
admin.settings.timezone.title: Timezone
admin.settings.timezone.description: Your availability hours are interpreted in this timezone.
admin.settings.portfolio.title: Portfolio links
admin.settings.portfolio.description: Shown on the confirmation page after booking, filterable by mission type.
confirm.portfolio.title: A few projects in the meantime
landing.hero.headline: Your booking link for
landing.hero.description: The open source Calendly alternative. No subscription. Hosted by you.
landing.features.title: Everything you need
landing.features.subtitle: A complete booking tool built for freelancers, without the bloat.
landing.features.calendar.title: Google Calendar sync
landing.features.calendar.desc: Reads your busy slots and creates calendar events automatically.
landing.features.brief.title: Prospect brief
landing.features.brief.desc: Collects stack, budget and urgency before you even meet.
landing.features.busy.title: Busy mode
landing.features.busy.desc: Automatically reduce available slots when you are on a mission.
landing.features.email.title: Email automation
landing.features.email.desc: 24h reminders, booking confirmations, new booking alerts.
landing.features.insights.title: Prospect insights
landing.features.insights.desc: AI compatibility score and tailored conversation angles.
landing.features.multi.title: Multi-user
landing.features.multi.desc: Several freelancers sharing one self-hosted instance.
landing.flow.title: How it works
landing.flow.subtitle: Three steps from prospect to booked call.
landing.flow.step1.title: Prospect arrives
landing.flow.step1.desc: They land on your page from Malt, LinkedIn or your portfolio — greeted with a message tailored to their source.
landing.flow.step2.title: Fills the brief
landing.flow.step2.desc: Project description, stack, budget, urgency — all collected before you even meet.
landing.flow.step3.title: Picks a slot
landing.flow.step3.desc: Availability is synced with your Google Calendar. Invite and confirmation email sent automatically.
landing.deploy.title: Deploy in minutes
landing.deploy.subtitle: Docker, your server, your rules. The setup takes under 5 minutes.
landing.deploy.check1: Your data stays on your server
landing.cta.headline: Your booking link. Your data. Your server.
directory.subtitle: Book a discovery call

reset_password.title: Reset your password
reset_password.body: You requested a password reset. Click the button below to choose a new one.
reset_password.expiry: This link expires in 1 hour. If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

confirmation.title: It's confirmed, {firstName}!
confirmation.invite_pending: You'll receive a Google Calendar invitation with the meeting link.
confirmation.phone_note: You'll be called at the number you provided, at the time of the meeting.

reminder.subject: Reminder — our {eventTypeName} tomorrow
reminder.body: We're meeting tomorrow at {time} for our {eventTypeName}.
reminder.context: If your context has changed since you booked, feel free to reply to this email — it'll help me come even better prepared.

notification.subject: New booking — {clientName} ({eventTypeName})
notification.title: New booking
notification.phone_pending: Phone call — the number will be shared with you 30 min before.

phone_reveal.title: Your call is coming up
phone_reveal.intro: You have a phone call with {clientName} at {time}. Here's the number to dial:
